passives.name: Immolate
passives.effects: Taking or dealing damage activates this passive for 3 seconds. Deal {{as|15 magic damage}} every second to enemies within {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 325 (+ 100% '''bonus''' [[size]]) units, with the damage being increased to 150% against {{tip|minions}} and 200% against {{tip|monsters}}. This executes minions that would be killed by one more tick of damage.

effects_structured.raw: Taking or dealing damage activates Immolate for 3 seconds.
Immolate deals 15 magic damage per second to nearby enemies (325 radius, increased by bonus size), with increased damage against minions and monsters.
Immolate executes minions that would be killed by one more tick of damage.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution-semantics review: Immolate is a refreshed 3-second aura state that activates when the holder deals or takes damage, not a one-time instant effect.
Player-visible behavior: while Immolate is active, the aura ticks every second in a 325 (+100% bonus size) radius for 15 magic damage with 150%/200% minion/monster multipliers.
Minion execute behavior is modeled as a next-tick threshold check that should resolve from the current Immolate tick damage and multipliers.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
